rankedFindings.evidence: No source currently pairs consumer RGB/MediaPipe output with independent timestamps and absolute reference angles.
Invalid sets still report High camera confidence; visibility confidence does not predict set validity or scientific validation.
The protocol/readiness flow specifies front view while upload/coaching copy requests side view. No paired-view evidence resolves metric equivalence.
Eight of eleven tapes abstain or qualify; reasons are small sample, impossible asymmetry/flexion, one-sided view, knee-less reps, or no reps.
Three tapes report jumps, but there is no independent event/angle reference showing that a different filter improves outcomes without lag.

decisions.cameraCopy: change to one protocol-owned front-view source; label sagittal-sensitive metrics experimental until paired-view evidence exists
